headline: Couple's Shared Spotify Playlist Has Become A Weapon, They Keep Adding 'Baby Shark' Passive-Aggressively
summary: The playlist now has 47 versions of 'Baby Shark.' Their relationship is 'on thin ice.'
fullBody: Megan and Jake SpotifyWar have been battling through their shared playlist. 'He added Nickelback,' Megan said. 'She added Baby Shark,' Jake countered. The playlist has now devolved into 47 versions of 'Baby Shark.' Their friends have refused to ride in the car with them. Their therapist has asked them to make separate playlists. They've added 'Baby Shark' to the therapist's playlist.
